title: MDN: Flexbox vs Grid
description: MDN's official guide on the relationship between Grid and Flexbox — when to use each and how they complement each other.

title: CSS-Tricks: Flexbox vs Grid
description: Clear breakdown of when to reach for each tool with visual examples and decision tables.

title: Grid vs Flexbox — When to Use Which
description: Kevin Powell explains the practical differences and demonstrates the 'Grid outside, Flexbox inside' pattern.
author: Kevin Powell

title: Flexbox or Grid — How to Decide
description: Web Dev Simplified walks through 5 layout scenarios and shows the best tool for each.
author: Web Dev Simplified

title: CSS Grid vs Flexbox — Real-World Scenarios
description: DesignCourse builds the same UI 3 ways — Flexbox-only, Grid-only, and combined — to demonstrate the best approach.
author: DesignCourse

title: The Difference Between Grid and Flexbox
description: The Net Ninja's clear explanation of the fundamental difference between content-first (Flexbox) and layout-first (Grid) approaches.
author: The Net Ninja

title: Rachel Andrew: Should I Use Grid or Flexbox?
description: Rachel Andrew (CSS Grid spec editor) shares her thoughts on how to choose between Grid and Flexbox.
author: Rachel Andrew

title: Smashing Magazine: Solving Layout Problems with Grid and Flexbox
description: How to combine Grid and Flexbox to solve common layout challenges in production.

title: Flexbox Froggy
description: Fun interactive game to master Flexbox concepts through 24 levels.

title: CSS Grid Garden
description: Interactive game to learn CSS Grid concepts through 28 levels.
author: Codepip
